## Checklist

Please ensure the following before submitting:

- [ ] The changes adhere to Apollo Care’s forward‑looking guidance and do not promise guaranteed returns or insurance coverage.
- [ ] Every new or modified Markdown file includes the forward‑looking disclaimer blockquote at the top and bottom.
- [ ] No private keys, seed phrases, wallet routing details or signer lists are included.
- [ ] Tokenomic percentages and capital structures remain consistent with the canonical allocations.
- [ ] If diagrams or assets were added, they are stored in `diagrams/` and referenced via copies in `docs/assets/`.
- [ ] All tables contain only short phrases, numbers or images, not long sentences.
- [ ] Search for banned phrases (“guaranteed”, “will deliver”, “fixed yield”, “must buy APH for coverage”, “insurance company”) and confirm none are present.
- [ ] The Markdown renders correctly on GitHub (previewed locally or via GitHub’s preview).
